_about: Handcrafted retrieval queries against the token-savior codebase. Ground truth = list of symbol names that should appear in top-K of a semantic search. Queries deliberately avoid keyword overlap with the target symbol name to stress the semantic path.

queries.query: fuse two ranked lists of search results
merge results via reciprocal rank fusion
convert plain text into a dense vector embedding
detect strongly connected components in an import graph
backfill missing vector rows for existing observations
deduplicate memory observations that are too similar
walk a project tree and enumerate all functions and classes
scan an FTS5 index with BM25 ranking
save a new memory observation to the database
load the embedding model only once
turn a numpy array into L2 normalised float list
detect which tests are impacted by a change
list every file that imports a given file
extract the shortest path between two symbols in the call graph
